Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Okhotsk | title = [[:en:Okhotsk Subprefecture|Okhotsk Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|Cities]] | list1 = *[[:en:Abashiri|Abashiri]] *[[:en:Kitami|Kitami]] *[[:en:Monbetsu, Hokkaido|Monbetsu]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Abashiri District, Hokkaido|Abashiri District]] **[[:en:Bihoro, Hokkaido|Bihoro]] **[[:en:Ōzora, Hokkaido|Ōzora]] **[[:en:Tsubetsu, Hokkaido|Tsubetsu]] *[[:en:Monbetsu District, Hokkaido|Monbetsu District]] **[[:en:Engaru, Hokkaido|Engaru]] **[[:en:Nishiokoppe, Hokkaido|Nishiokoppe]] **[[:en:Okoppe, Hokkaido|Okoppe]] **[[:en:Ōmu, Hokkaido|Ōmu]] **[[:en:Takinoue, Hokkaido|Takinoue]] **[[:en:Yūbetsu, Hokkaido|Yūbetsu]] *[[:en:Shari District, Hokkaido|Shari District]] **[[:en:Kiyosato, Hokkaido|Kiyosato]] **[[:en:Koshimizu, Hokkaido|Koshimizu]] **[[:en:Shari, Hokkaido|Shari]] *[[:en:Tokoro District, Hokkaido|Tokoro District]] **[[:en:Kunneppu, Hokkaido|Kunneppu]] **[[:en:Oketo, Hokkaido|Oketo]] **[[:en:Saroma, Hokkaido|Saroma]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
